finding_results.notes: Home-fallout scene now sustains fear with a multi-line mother-son exchange about targeted school exposure and bodily anxiety before transitioning back to lock/packing logistics.

Both lead handoffs now include friction: watermark data remains provisional, key work-order metadata is missing, surveillance has an overwrite deadline, and the next action (records + preservation notices) faces an exemption and source-risk obstacle.
Jalen is framed with explicit canonical age language ('twelve') and conflicting older-age phrasing was removed from the chapter.
Meeting dialogue now reduces slogan repetition and uses differentiated tactical pressure (patrol map, command-routed witness calls, civil oversight risk, witness-contamination allegation exposure).

summary: All five structural/craft findings were addressed in-place in chapter_05 with focused edits to causality, emotional consequence, lead resistance, continuity age alignment, and command-scene diction pressure.
